events.place: VERIFIED- Burton Manor/Park/Estate, Duncton Parish, Sussex, England  -Inherited in the 15th century by the Goring's, who probably built the 1st house on the site. In 1724 it passed by marriage to the Biddulph's.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Goring IV於1470年出生在英國素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨時，他的父親John Goring III22歲，母親Joan Hewster23歲。他於1490年與Constance Dyke在英國素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨被列為lord of the manors of burton and litchfield。他去世於1521年10月15日在他的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在英國素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Goring IV于1470年出生在英国素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨时，他的父亲John Goring III22岁，母亲Joan Hewster23岁。他于1490年与Constance Dyke在英国素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨被列为lord of the manors of burton and litchfield。他去世于1521年10月15日在他的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在英国素可伯頓 煙雨 科茨。

nameMeanings.name: Goring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Oxfordshire and West Sussex named Goring, from Old English Gāringas ‘people of Gāra’, a short form of various compound names with the first element gār ‘spear’.

variants.name: Goering
meanings: topographic name derived from Slavic gora ‘mountain, hill’. Compare Goring .

variants.name: Gorringe
meanings: English (Surrey and Suffolk): variant of   Goring  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Goring IV was born in 1470, in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, his father, John Goring III, was 22 and his mother, Joan Hewster, was 23. He married Constance Dyke in 1490, in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 8 daughters. His occupation is listed as lord of the manors of burton and litchfield in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. He died on 15 October 1521, in his hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England.

fr.Burton with Coates, Sussex, England: Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Goring IV est né en 1470, à Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Goring III, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan Hewster, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Constance Dyke en 1490, à Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 8 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est lord of the manors of burton and litchfield à Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 15 octobre 1521, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Burton with Coates, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.Burton with Coates, Sussex, England: Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Goring IV 1470 in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Goring III 22 und seine Mutter Joan Hewster 23. Er hat 1490 in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England Constance Dyke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 8 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als lord of the manors of burton and litchfield in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. Oktober 1521 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Burton with Coates, Sussex, England begraben.

it.Burton with Coates, Sussex, England: Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Goring IV è nato il nel 1470 nel Burton with Coates, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John Goring III, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan Hewster, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Constance Dyke nel 1490, nel Burton with Coates, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 8 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come lord of the manors of burton and litchfield nel Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 15 ottobre 1521, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Burton with Coates, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Goring IVが1470年にイギリススセックスブルトン ウィス コアツで生まれた時，父John Goring IIIは22歳，母Joan Hewsterは23歳であった。1490年にイギリススセックスブルトン ウィス コアツでConstance Dykeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリススセックスブルトン ウィス コアツでの職業はlord of the manors of burton and litchfieldと記録されている。彼は1521年10月15日に故郷で51歳で死去し，イギリススセックスブルトン ウィス コアツにて埋葬された。

ko.Burton with Coates, Sussex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Goring IV(이)가 1470년 영국 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Goring III(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Hewster(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1490년 영국 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠에서 Constance Dyke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠에서 lord of the manors of burton and litchfield이었다. 그는 1521년 10월 15일 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 버턴 위스 코츠에 묻혔다.

pt.Burton with Coates, Sussex, England: Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Goring IV nasceu em 1470, em Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Goring III, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan Hewster, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Constance Dyke em 1490, em Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 8 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como lord of the manors of burton and litchfield em Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 15 de outubro de 1521, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.Burton with Coates, Sussex, England: буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Goring IV родился в 1470 г. в местности буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Goring III было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Hewster, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Constance Dyke в 1490 г. в местности буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 8 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии lord of the manors of burton and litchfield в местности буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 15 октября 1521 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности буртон вит коэитс, суссекс, Англия.

es.Burton with Coates, Sussex, England: Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Goring IV nació en 1470, en Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Goring III, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan Hewster, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Constance Dyke en 1490, en Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 8 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era lord of the manors of burton and litchfield en Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 15 de octubre de 1521, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Burton with Coates, Sussex, Inglaterra.
